landingpage.undertitel: Kammarslusen Ribe is a payment system for vessels passing through the Ribe lock. It makes it easy for boat owners to pay for passage and allows the lock operators to keep track of which vessels have paid and which have not.
landingpage.section1Content: Kammarslusen Ribe is a payment system for vessels passing through the Ribe lock. It makes it easy for boat owners to pay for passage and allows the lock operators to keep track of which vessels have paid and which have not.

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This is a school project and not an official product of Ribe Sejlklub. All information and features are fictional and for demonstration purposes only.

termsofservice.title: Terms of Service
termsofservice.introduction: Welcome to Ribe Sejlklub's payment system. By using our services, you agree to comply with these terms of service. Please read the terms carefully, as they contain important information about your rights and obligations.

publisher.title: Publisher
publisher.name: School Project – Group Magnus and Kasper

section1.title: §1 Delivery
section1.content: When you make a purchase through our payment system, access to electricity is activated via the connected Modbus units. We strive to ensure that delivery occurs immediately after approved authorization.

section2.title: §2 Right of Withdrawal
section2.content: By starting the consumption of electricity, you provide your express consent that the delivery begins and that the statutory 14-day right of withdrawal for online purchases is waived, as the service (electricity) is consumed at the moment of delivery.

section3.title: §3 Payment and Reservation
section3.content: We use a reservation model via Stripe. When the service starts, a fixed amount is reserved on your payment card. When consumption ends, only the actual amount for the delivered electricity is charged, and the remaining part of the reservation is released. Depending on your bank, it may take a few business days before the reservation is shown as canceled in your bank statement.

section4.title: §4 Disclaimer
section4.content: Ribe Sejlklub's payment system is provided 'as is' without any form of warranty. We disclaim any responsibility for any damage to boat equipment or losses that may arise as a result of system errors or power outages.

section5.title: §5 School Project Disclaimer
section5.content: This is a school project and not an official product of Ribe Sejlklub. All information, prices, and functions are fictional and solely for demonstration purposes. Use of the system is at your own risk.

section6.title: §6 Governing Law and Jurisdiction
section6.content: These terms of service are governed by Danish law. Any dispute shall be brought before the Danish courts.

section7.title: §7 Contact Information
section7.content: If you have questions regarding these terms, you are welcome to contact us at support@pins.dk.

privacypolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacypolicy.introduction: This privacy policy describes how Ribe Sejlklub collects, uses and protects your personal data when you use our payment system. We take your data security seriously and comply with applicable legislation, including the GDPR.

publisher.title: Data Controller
publisher.name: School project – Group Magnus and Kasper

section1.title: §1 What data do we collect?
section1.content: When you create an account and make a purchase, we collect the information necessary to deliver the service. This typically includes your name, your email address, technical network data (such as IP address for security purposes) and your purchase history.

section2.title: §2 Third parties and data sharing
section2.content: We never sell your personal data. In order to operate the platform, we share necessary data with trusted subcontractors (data processors). Your payment details are handled exclusively by our payment gateway, Stripe, and we never have direct access to your full card details. Our infrastructure and security are provided by Cloudflare.

section3.title: §3 Cookies and tracking
section3.content: Our website uses only necessary cookies (technical cookies) to manage your login and ensure the payment system functions correctly. We do not use third-party marketing or tracking cookies.

section4.title: §4 Security measures
section4.content: To ensure the highest possible protection of your data and prevent unauthorised access, all data traffic is encrypted. It is furthermore an internal requirement that all our administrators and developers use two-factor authentication (2FA) for access to critical systems.

section5.title: §5 Retention of receipts (Danish Bookkeeping Act)
section5.content: Even if you delete your account, we are obliged under the Danish Bookkeeping Act to retain receipts and associated transaction data (including your email address linked to the purchase) for 5 years from the end of the relevant financial year. This data is retained solely for accounting purposes.

section6.title: §6 Your rights and deletion of data
section6.content: You have the right at any time to access the data we hold about you. You can delete your account under 'Settings'. Upon deletion, your personal information is permanently removed from our active databases, with the exception of data covered by the Bookkeeping Act (see §5).

section7.title: §7 School Project Disclaimer
section7.content: This system and this privacy policy have been developed as a school project and do not constitute an official or legally binding document for Ribe Sejlklub. All information, data handling and features are fictional and for demonstration purposes only.

section8.title: §8 Contact Information
section8.content: If you have questions about our processing of your data, or wish to exercise your rights, you can contact us at support@pins.dk.

faq.title: Do you have questions?
faq.undertitle: Here are some of the most common questions we receive from our users. If you cannot find the answer to your question here, please feel free to contact us directly.

questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: You can create an account by clicking the 'Sign up' button on the front page and filling in the registration form with your details.

questions.question: How do I pay to pass through the lock?
questions.answer: You can pay by logging in to your account and following the instructions to complete the payment.

questions.question: What do I do if I have problems with payment?
questions.answer: If you experience problems with payment, please contact our support team at support@pins.dk.

questions.question: How can I view my payment history?
questions.answer: You can view your payment history by logging in to your account and navigating to the 'History' section.

questions.question: How can I change my account details?
questions.answer: You can change your account details by logging in to your account and going to the 'Settings' section, where you can update your information.

HowToPay.title: The Payment Process
HowToPay.subtitle: Easy and secure – electricity payment made simple
HowToPay.description: We use Stripe to handle all transactions, so you can focus on sailing.

step1.title: Reserve amount
step1.description: When you reserve a lock passage, we place a hold on your card to ensure you have sufficient funds for the trip. This amount is automatically released after the passage.

step2.title: Complete payment
step2.description: We use Stripe, one of the world's most trusted payment providers, to ensure your details are protected throughout the entire process.

step3.title: Enjoy the voyage
step3.description: After the passage, we automatically settle your actual consumption. If the reserved amount exceeds what was used, we refund the difference immediately.

notFound.description: Oops! The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved to another address.

otp.title: Your One-Time Code
otp.subtitle: Enter this code to log in
otp.validFor: The code is valid for 10 minutes
otp.warning: Never share this code with anyone – not even with us!

invoice.title: Invoice
invoice.infoText: This is your proof of purchase. Please keep this email for at least 2 years as documentation for your right of complaint.
invoice.withdrawalText: As this involves the immediate delivery of energy to your balance, you acknowledge upon purchase that the right of withdrawal lapses once the service is taken into use.

reservation.title: Reservation Confirmation
reservation.intro: We have placed a hold on your payment card.
reservation.notCharged: The funds have not yet been charged.
reservation.howText: The amount is held on your bank account. When you end your consumption, we charge exactly the amount used and release the remainder.
reservation.invoiceText: Your final invoice will be sent once consumption has ended.
